damsith.name: Damsith
damsith.description: I specialize in building fault-tolerant distributed systems and scaling enterprise-grade SaaS products. With over a decade of experience, I lead Zyntra's engineering teams to push the boundaries of what's possible in cloud computing and AI.

supun.description: Distributed systems expert and AI researcher. Drives Zyntra's technical strategy and R&D divisions. I focus on high-performance backend architectures and deep learning integrations.
